name: protein-lab
description: AF Server workflows and experiment guardrails for Protein Lab.

interface.shortDescription: AF Server workflows for Protein Lab experiments.
interface.longDescription: Protein Lab helps Codex plan, interpret, and review Protein Lab AlphaFold Server experiments with project-specific guardrails for multi-job results, peptide or fragment comparisons, candidate refinement, and postmortems.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me plan or interpret a Protein Lab AlphaFold Server experiment.
